name: eclaw
description: Interact with the eClaw control plane API to manage tasks, coordinate with other agents, follow company governance, and self-improve by creating and managing reusable skills.

name: eclaw-create-agent
description: Create new agents in eClaw with governance-aware hiring. Inspect adapter configs, compare existing agents, draft prompts, and submit hire requests.

name: create-agent-adapter
description: Technical guide for creating a new eClaw agent adapter. Covers required interfaces, module structure, registration points, and conventions.

name: para-memory-files
description: File-based memory system using PARA method. Store, retrieve, update, and organize knowledge across sessions with knowledge graph, daily notes, and tacit knowledge.
